name: Cheese and Apple Tartlets
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted butter, cut into small pieces
1 1 1/4 pounds Cooking apples, peeled, cored and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Pastry:
1. Combine flour and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add butter and mix with a pastry blender or 2 knives until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Gradually sprinkle ice water, tossing with a fork until all is moistened.
4. Gather dough into a ball. Divide into two halves.
5. Form each half into a square. Wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Assemble:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Cut each dough square into quarters.
3. On a lightly floured surface, roll out each pastry piece to a 5-inch circle.
4. Press pastry rounds into 4-inch tartlet pans. Trim the edges.
5. Set pans on a baking sheet.
6. Spoon chopped apples evenly into pastry shells.
7. Sprinkle each with 1 teaspoon sugar.
8. Bake at 425 degrees F for 20 minutes until pastry is lightly browned and apple is tender.
9. Remove from oven.
10. Sprinkle each tartlet with 2 teaspoons cheese.
11. Return to oven and bake at 425 degrees F for an additional 5 minutes until cheese is golden brown. Serve hot or cold.
